language.description: Choose the language used in the app
language.title: Language

theme.description: Set the color mode and style together
theme.title: Theme

theme_preset.description: Choose a color style for the selected mode
theme_preset.description_system: Default style is applied in system mode
theme_preset.title: Style

default_type.description: The format selected by default when adding a link
default_type.title: Default download format

playlist_limit.description: Number of videos to fetch from a playlist at once
playlist_limit.title: Playlist download count

actions.description: Checks the latest Windows portable release on GitHub
actions.title: Update check

current_version.description: The version currently running in this app
current_version.title: Current version

apply.description: Closes the app, replaces the install directory with the prepared files, and starts the new version
apply.notice: Applying version {{version}} will close the app and restart it with the new version

latest_version.description: Version status based on the latest release
latest_version.title: Latest version status

message.unsupported: Automatic updates are supported on Windows only

download.description: Downloads and extracts the portable zip when a new version is available
download.description_ready: The update package has been downloaded and extracted
download.title: Update download

download_status.apply_ready: Download and extraction are complete, and the update is ready to apply
download_status.description: Shows the download and extraction progress
download_status.title: Download status

status.unsupported: Automatic updates are supported on Windows only
status.up_to_date: You are using the latest version

progress.applying: Preparing to close the app and restart with the new version
progress.checking: Re-checking the latest release before download
progress.description: Download progress for the zip package
progress.extracting: Download finished and extraction is in progress
progress.title: Progress
progress.unsupported: Progress is shown on Windows only

ready_state.description: Preparation state for the apply step in the next phase
ready_state.next_step: Update apply will be implemented in the next phase
ready_state.title: Ready state

toast.apply_failed: Could not start applying the update.
toast.download_completed: The update package was downloaded and extracted.
toast.download_failed: Could not prepare the update package.
toast.runtime_load_failed: Could not load app runtime information.
